lines.speaker: Jorzik
lines.text: The finest smiths from all over Gielinor come here to work, and I buy the fruit of their craft. Armour made from the higher metals!

lines.speaker: Jorzik
lines.text: You just don't appreciate the beauty of fine metalwork.

sections.title: Sometimes when attempting to open the gate to the anvils with less than 60 Smithing

lines.speaker: Jorzik
lines.text: Only the top smiths are allowed in there!
